commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: And likewise a Levite, when he was at the place, came and looked on him, and passed by on the other side. Cornelius a Lapide And likewise a Levite when he was at the place, came and looked on him, and passed by on the other side. The Levite amongst the Jews, like the deacons in the Church, assisted the priest in his ministrations. He was therefore of one mind with the priest, for as the priest so is the Levite, as the prelate so the deacon, as the master so the servant, as the teacher so the disciple. And so he also passed by on the other side.
